seoTitle: North St Marys vs North Star — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North St Marys and North Star. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North St Marys vs North Star: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North St Marys and North Star.
heading: North St Marys vs North Star — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North St Marys, New South Wales and North Star, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Star has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to North St Marys (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North St Marys or North Star safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North St Marys has a flood risk score of 53/100, while North Star scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North St Marys scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. North Star scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North St Marys or North Star?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Star has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
